user_request: Design a Convergio-wide self-improving optimization system (Evolution Engine) that auto-improves over time like F1 continuous optimization, based on real operational data. Propose optimizations safely using daily micro-loops and weekly night runners. Cover the full Convergio ecosystem with human governance, immutable evaluators, safe experimentation, agent evolution, and Maranello serving as both canary benchmark and dashboard UI surface.

constraints.text: No self-authorizing merges — all optimization changes via human-approved PRs only
No secrets in telemetry data, logs, or optimization proposals — secrets-safe handling throughout
Every optimization experiment has a fixed token/compute budget with auto-abort on breach
No PII in telemetry or optimization data — privacy boundaries enforced at collection and storage
Evaluator/guardrail code is immutable by the optimization subsystem — integrity enforcement required
Web research results tagged as hypothesis only — never auto-promoted to production decisions
Every experiment targets exactly one metric and one target — no multi-variable mutations
All optimization decisions logged with full audit trail, reasoning chain, and timestamps

requirements.text: Unified telemetry collection across all Convergio subsystems: .claude agents, CI/CD, runtime services, mesh, database, workload distribution, latency, and performance
Daily micro-loop that identifies quick-win optimizations from recent 24h telemetry data
Weekly night runner performing deep analysis, trend detection, cross-metric correlation, and comprehensive optimization proposals
Independent optimizer subsystem analyzing telemetry and generating typed, structured improvement proposals
Immutable evaluator/guardrail subsystem validating all proposals, unmodifiable by optimization code paths
Safe experimentation model: single target, single metric, fixed budget, automatic rollback, full reversibility
Human governance gate: recommend and open PRs only — no self-authorizing merges or production rollout
Web research integration as hypothesis source only, with human review gate before any adoption
Agent evolution system based on real repository work patterns, task outcomes, token efficiency, and error analysis
Replay/shadow/canary/promotion gate pipeline for safe staged rollout of optimizations
Documentation, governance framework, decision audit trail, and ROI measurement system
Cost control with per-experiment budgets, privacy boundaries for all data, and secrets-safe handling
Maranello evolution assessment: how the design system should evolve to embrace self-improvement philosophy
Maranello as canary/benchmark repository with strict CI gates (build, unit, e2e, bundle, a11y, constitution) as experiment validation surface
Maranello as observability/dashboard UI surface using existing chart, gauge, and data components to display optimization telemetry and decisions

Reuse and extend existing dashboard_web (Convergio Control Room) as the Evolution Engine ops surface, leveraging its GridStack widgets, KPI strip, scheduler, optimize signals, and Maranello DS integration
Extract generalizable evolution UI patterns from dashboard_web integration back into Maranello as reusable web components (mn-evolution-kpi, mn-experiment-card) following existing WC conventions

tasks.do: Create Evolution Engine architecture design document (ADR) defining all subsystems (telemetry, evaluator, optimizer, loops, experimentation, rollout, governance), their interfaces, data flows, and isolation boundaries
tasks.summary: Architecture ADR for all Evolution Engine subsystems

tasks.do: Audit current Convergio telemetry surface area — catalog all existing metrics, logs, traces, CI outputs, and performance data across repos and services into a structured inventory JSON
tasks.summary: Inventory all existing Convergio telemetry sources

tasks.do: Define measurable baseline KPIs with current values and improvement targets: latency p50/p95, CI pass rate, build time, bundle size, agent success rate, cost per task, test coverage, time to merge
tasks.summary: Baseline KPI definitions with targets

tasks.do: Design canonical TypeScript type definitions for all telemetry events, optimization proposals, experiment records, and audit entries — the data model shared by all subsystems
tasks.summary: Canonical TypeScript data model for all subsystems

tasks.do: Write ADR documenting the Maranello vs dashboard_web architectural split: Maranello = reusable UI component platform + canary benchmark repo; dashboard_web = productized Convergio ops app shell extended with Evolution Engine sections. Document which patterns extract back to Maranello and which stay as app-specific widgets
tasks.summary: ADR: Maranello vs dashboard_web architectural split

tasks.do: Implement central telemetry collector module with standardized event ingestion, in-memory buffering, deduplication, and configurable routing to storage backends
tasks.summary: Telemetry collector core with buffering and routing

tasks.do: Create telemetry sanitization layer that strips PII, secrets, and sensitive data from all events before storage, with configurable rules, allowlists, and redaction logging
tasks.summary: PII/secrets sanitizer for telemetry pipeline

tasks.do: Create adapter collecting .claude agent metrics: task outcomes (success/fail/partial), token usage per model, session duration, model routing decisions, error categories, and cost per task
tasks.summary: Agent telemetry adapter for .claude metrics

tasks.do: Create adapter collecting CI/CD pipeline metrics: build durations, test pass/fail/skip counts, deployment outcomes, bundle sizes, lint warnings, and gate verdicts
tasks.summary: CI/CD telemetry adapter for pipeline metrics

tasks.do: Create adapter collecting runtime/mesh/database metrics: service latency percentiles, error rates, mesh throughput, DB query times, connection pool stats, workload distribution, and resource utilization
tasks.summary: Runtime/mesh/DB telemetry adapter

tasks.do: Implement telemetry storage backend with time-series indexing, configurable retention (hot 7d / warm 30d / cold 90d), and query API supporting range queries, aggregations, and percentile calculations
tasks.summary: Time-series storage with retention and query API

tasks.do: Implement evaluator core module with filesystem-level read-only enforcement, checksum verification on load, tamper detection alerting, and proposal validation interface
tasks.summary: Evaluator core with immutability and tamper detection

tasks.do: Create guardrails module enforcing: per-experiment budget limits with auto-abort, single-target enforcement, rollback trigger conditions, reversibility verification, and blast radius containment rules
tasks.summary: Safety guardrails: budget, rollback, single-target

tasks.do: Implement proposal validation pipeline: JSON schema check, constraint verification (C-01..C-08), risk scoring (1-10 scale), budget verification, and human-review-required flag computation
tasks.summary: Proposal validation: schema, constraints, risk scoring

tasks.do: Implement per-experiment and per-cycle cost tracking with configurable token/compute limits, real-time budget monitoring, auto-abort on breach, and cost rollup reporting for ROI
tasks.summary: Cost control: budget limits, monitoring, auto-abort

tasks.do: Write evaluator immutability test harness proving optimizer cannot modify evaluator: attempt filesystem writes (expect rejection), verify checksum enforcement, verify tamper detection fires alerts
tasks.summary: Immutability proof test suite for evaluator

tasks.do: Implement optimizer core that queries telemetry storage, identifies improvement opportunities using statistical analysis, and generates typed OptimizationProposal objects with target, metric, hypothesis, expected improvement, and rollback plan
tasks.summary: Optimizer core: telemetry analysis to proposals

tasks.do: Create canonical proposal format module with required fields (target, metric, hypothesis, budget, expectedImprovement, rollbackPlan, reversibilityProof, riskAssessment) and JSON schema validation
tasks.summary: Proposal format with schema validation

tasks.do: Implement draft PR generator that converts approved proposals into GitHub draft PRs with full context: proposal details, expected impact, rollback instructions, experiment constraints, evaluator sign-off, and audit reference
tasks.summary: PR generator: proposals to GitHub draft PRs

tasks.do: Build end-to-end proposal pipeline orchestrator wiring: optimizer generates → evaluator validates → risk scores → budget checks → PR generation — each stage independently auditable with structured log output
tasks.summary: Proposal pipeline: optimizer→evaluator→PR wiring

tasks.do: Create experiment runner executing approved experiments with: fixed budget enforcement via CostController, single-metric tracking, automatic rollback on regression beyond threshold, timeout enforcement, and full audit logging
tasks.summary: Experiment runner with budget/rollback/audit

tasks.do: Implement daily micro-loop that runs at configurable cadence (default 06:00 UTC), scans last 24h telemetry for regressions and quick-win opportunities, generates bounded proposals, and respects daily budget ceiling
tasks.summary: Daily micro-loop with 24h telemetry scan

tasks.do: Implement weekly night runner (default Sunday 02:00 UTC) performing deep analysis: multi-week trend detection, cross-metric correlation, regression root cause identification, architecture-level proposals, and comprehensive summary report
tasks.summary: Weekly night runner with deep trend analysis

tasks.do: Create cron-based scheduler orchestrating daily micro-loops and weekly runners with configurable timing, deadlock prevention, concurrency limits (max 1 loop active), and skip-if-running semantics
tasks.summary: Cron scheduler for daily+weekly loops

tasks.do: Write integration tests for daily + weekly loops: mock telemetry → optimizer → evaluator → PR pipeline → audit trail — verify full cycle end-to-end including budget enforcement and rollback
tasks.summary: Loop architecture integration tests

tasks.do: Implement agent work pattern analyzer processing task outcomes, token efficiency ratios, error categories, model routing hit/miss rates, and session-level performance to identify improvement patterns and regressions
tasks.summary: Agent pattern analyzer from real work data

tasks.do: Create agent configuration proposer generating improvement proposals: model routing changes, prompt refinements, tool usage optimizations, context window strategies — all as evaluator-gated OptimizationProposal objects
tasks.summary: Agent config proposer for model/prompt/tools

tasks.do: Implement replay system that re-runs past agent tasks (sanitized inputs, read-only execution, no side effects) with proposed configuration changes to measure improvement before proposing via PR
tasks.summary: Agent task replay for safe validation

tasks.do: Wire agent evolution subsystem (pattern-analyzer → config-proposer → replay → evaluator → PR) into the daily/weekly loop architecture with proper scheduling priority and budget allocation
tasks.summary: Wire agent evolution into loop architecture

tasks.do: Write test suite for pattern analyzer accuracy, config proposer safety (no proposals exceeding budget), replay system isolation (no side effects), and end-to-end agent evolution flow with mock data
tasks.summary: Agent evolution unit + integration tests

tasks.do: Implement CI pipeline optimizer analyzing build times, test parallelism, cache hit rates, and dependency install durations — generating proposals for CI config improvements, caching strategies, and test ordering
tasks.summary: CI pipeline optimizer with build/test analysis

tasks.do: Implement runtime configuration optimizer analyzing service latency, resource utilization, and error rates — proposing changes for caching, connection pools, timeouts, and resource allocation
tasks.summary: Runtime config optimizer for services

tasks.do: Implement database/query optimizer analyzing query execution times, index utilization, connection pool metrics — proposing query rewrites, index additions, and connection pool tuning
tasks.summary: Database/query optimizer for DB telemetry

tasks.do: Register CI, runtime, and DB optimizers as pluggable analyzers in the optimizer core — create platform optimizer index that feeds all domain proposals into the standard evaluation pipeline
tasks.summary: Register platform optimizers as plugins

tasks.do: Write Maranello + dashboard_web evolution assessment: audit dashboard_web prior art (67 JS files, 14K LoC, GridStack widgets, optimize.js session signals, nightly-jobs scheduler, KPI strip, IPC budget/router/skills/models panels, Maranello WC loader), document architectural split decision, map NaSra integration points, and define progressive adoption roadmap
tasks.summary: Evolution assessment with dashboard_web prior art audit

tasks.do: Create Maranello canary benchmark configuration using existing strict CI gates (build, vitest unit, playwright e2e, bundle size <=250KB, accessibility audit, token alignment, constitution check) as experiment validation surface with pass/fail criteria
tasks.summary: Canary benchmark config using Maranello CI gates

tasks.do: Add 'Evolution' section to dashboard_web Control Room: new nav pill, GridStack section with widget slots, section-aware scheduler registration for auto-refresh — reusing existing convergio-layout.js patterns and widget-catalog.js system for add/remove
tasks.summary: Add Evolution section to dashboard_web control room

tasks.do: Create evolution proposal widget for dashboard_web: optimization proposals table with approval status, risk scores, evaluator verdicts, and decision rationale — using existing mn-data-table, mn-modal, mn-badge patterns and widget-catalog.js registration
tasks.summary: Proposal widget for dashboard_web using existing patterns

tasks.do: Create experiment timeline widget for dashboard_web: experiment schedule, duration, outcomes, and stage progression (shadow/canary/staged/full) — extending existing nightly-jobs.js patterns, using Maranello Gantt and confidenceChart via mn-charts.js bridge
tasks.summary: Experiment timeline widget extending nightly-jobs pattern

tasks.do: Extend dashboard_web api_server.py with Evolution Engine API endpoints: /api/evolution/telemetry (query time-series), /api/evolution/proposals (list/detail), /api/evolution/experiments (status/history), /api/evolution/roi (attribution summary) — reading from telemetry storage and audit trail
tasks.summary: Extend api_server.py with Evolution Engine endpoints

tasks.do: Wire dashboard_web's existing optimize.js session learning signals and mn-kpi.js KPI data (tokens, cost, lines, agents, blocked) into Evolution Engine telemetry collector as a live data source — creating a dashboard-adapter that transforms existing /api/ responses into TelemetryEvent format
tasks.summary: Wire dashboard_web signals into telemetry collector

tasks.do: Extract reusable mn-evolution-kpi web component from dashboard integration back into Maranello: encapsulates evolution metric display (proposals/week, experiments active, ROI, canary status) following existing WC patterns (Shadow DOM, resolveEngine, CSS token inheritance, mn- prefix)
tasks.summary: Extract mn-evolution-kpi WC back to Maranello

tasks.do: Write governance framework document defining decision authority matrix, escalation paths, approval thresholds (risk score >=7 requires senior review), emergency override procedures, and responsibility assignments
tasks.summary: Governance framework with authority matrix

tasks.do: Implement append-only audit trail system recording every proposal, evaluation verdict, experiment outcome, and decision with timestamps, actor IDs, reasoning chains, and immutable log integrity
tasks.summary: Append-only audit trail for all decisions

tasks.do: Create web research integration module that queries external sources for optimization hypotheses, tags all results with hypothesisOnly status, requires human review gate before any adoption, and logs full provenance
tasks.summary: Web research as hypothesis with human gate

tasks.do: Implement ROI measurement framework tracking optimization impact: cost savings, performance deltas, time saved, quality improvements — with per-proposal attribution, trend reporting, and dashboard-ready output
tasks.summary: ROI tracker with attribution and trend output

tasks.do: Wire audit logger into optimizer, evaluator, experiment runner, PR generator, and loop scheduler — verify every decision point emits structured audit events with correlation IDs
tasks.summary: Wire audit trail into all subsystems

tasks.do: Implement shadow execution mode running proposals through the full pipeline (analysis → proposal → evaluation → experiment simulation) without applying any changes, producing shadow-mode reports for confidence building
tasks.summary: Shadow mode: full pipeline, no side effects

tasks.do: Create canary deployment gate running experiments on a single target (Maranello benchmark), comparing metrics before/after with statistical significance, and triggering automatic rollback if any gate fails or metric regresses
tasks.summary: Canary gate with Maranello benchmark + rollback

tasks.do: Create staged promotion pipeline: shadow → canary → staged → full, with human approval gates at each transition, configurable soak time (default 48h canary), and automatic regression detection between stages
tasks.summary: Promotion pipeline: shadow→canary→staged→full

tasks.do: Configure and execute first pilot experiment: Maranello bundle size optimization through complete Evolution Engine pipeline — telemetry → analysis → proposal → evaluation → shadow → canary → draft PR
tasks.summary: First pilot: Maranello bundle size optimization

tasks.do: Write end-to-end rollout pipeline tests: shadow mode validation, canary gate pass/fail scenarios, promotion gate transitions, rollback under regression, soak time enforcement, and audit trail completeness verification
tasks.summary: Rollout pipeline integration tests

tasks.do: Create final comprehensive integration test suite covering all Evolution Engine subsystems end-to-end: telemetry ingestion → optimizer analysis → evaluator validation → loop scheduling → agent evolution → platform optimization → canary rollout → promotion → audit completeness
tasks.summary: Final E2E integration test suite

tasks.do: Write final documentation package: Evolution Engine README, API reference, operator runbook, deployment guide, KPI baseline report, ADR index, and Maranello dashboard user guide
tasks.summary: Complete documentation package

tasks.do: Create final PR consolidating all Evolution Engine work with comprehensive changelog entry, migration notes, configuration guide, rollout plan, and links to all supporting documentation
tasks.summary: Final PR with changelog and rollout plan
